## Problem
<!-- One sentence: what breaks / what's missing without this change? -->

## Change summary
<!-- What did you actually do. Bullets OK. -->

## Tests
<!-- Unit tests added/updated. Integration notes. CI must be green before merge. -->

## Risk
<!-- Blast radius if this is wrong. Reversibility. On-chain implications. -->

## Backwards-compat
<!-- Anything downstream breaks? SDK consumers, deployed contracts? -->
